calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Reyes Hunter, CSR#6576.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING LLC.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant ANTHONY B. VARELA.
Declaration of plaintiff pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING LLC and against Defendant ANTHONY B. VARELA as follows:
Principal $1350.21
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $342.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $1692.71

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted; Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Alisa Kim of Counselor at Law 415-826-9160 appeared for plaintiff. / No other appearance.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted. Motion is granted. No opposition filed. The truth of the facts specified in the Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
